title: EKS Project Knowledge Base
description: Engineering Knowledge System - machine-readable project blueprint and charter

project_metadata.name: Engineering Knowledge System (EKS)
project_metadata.description: Schema-driven document registry and knowledge graph system for engineering asset management
project_metadata.purpose: Ingest, extract, and cross-reference engineering documents to build a searchable knowledge graph

key_modules: engine/core/ - Foundation: registry, revision, config, schema_loader, pipeline orchestration
engine/parsers/ - Plug-in document parsers (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, DGN, DWG)
config/schemas/ - 3-layer schema pattern (base/setup/config) for all schema sets
data_flows: File Scanner → Parser Router → Parser → Structure Detector → Health Scorer → Document Registry
Schema Loader validates base/setup/config chain with $ref resolution
ConfigRegistry provides SSOT access to global parameters

core_entities: Document - engineering document with metadata, revisions, structural elements
Asset - plant equipment/instrument with fragment-based schema
Ontology - ISO 15926-aligned class and relationship definitions
Discipline - engineering disciplines (PI, EL, IN, CI, etc.)
terminology: Fragment - reusable property group for asset schema composition
SSOT - Single Source of Truth for global parameters

workflows.name: Document Ingestion Pipeline
phases: Phase A: File discovery and placeholder registration
Phase B: Parse, detect structure, score health
Phase C: Manual review and locking

workflows.name: Schema Validation
workflows.description: Load and validate all schema files with $ref resolution

functions: SchemaLoader.load_all() - Load all schema files with cross-validation
ConfigRegistry.get() - SSOT access to global parameters
DocumentRegistry CRUD - Document metadata operations with revision tracking
RevisionManager - Revision history and latest-revision filtering
FileScanner - Directory walk, type validation, placeholder registration
ParserRouter - File type to parser class mapping
StructureDetector - Cover page, sections, tables, images detection

data_flows.name: Document Metadata Flow
data_flows.source: Raw engineering documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, DGN, DWG)

data_quality_checks: Ontology class map references valid classes
known_issues: I015 - DGN parser stub (48 CAD files unparseable) - Phase 3
I016 - Revision folder hierarchy inconsistency - Phase 2
I019 - Two project codes (131101 vs 131242) - Phase 2
I020 - Datadrop column range (33-112) fragment coverage - Phase 3
I021 - 22-64% data incompleteness across datadrop sheets - Phase 3

revision_history.author: opencode
revision_history.summary: Initial knowledge.json created for Phase 1 completion
